title: [Origin] Lapidion
description: Adds the Lapidion Origin, inspired by the Weeping Angels from Doctor Who
body:
# General Information
This datapack adds the Lapidion Origin (derived from the Latin word for stone 'lapis') inspired by the Weeping Angels from Doctor Who.             
The Origin requires **Origins** and **Pehkui**.                                     
**Note that this datapack is intended for multiplayer but may cause lag!**                                                        

## Lapidion 🟡🟡
As descendants of the Lonely Assassins that lived long ago, Lapidions still possess the same defensive mechanism.

🟡**Petrification**                                                                              
While being directly observed, you turn into stone.                                           
You can toggle this state on at will.                                                              
[_While petrified you are unable to move, attack, take damage and interact with blocks or entities_]

🟢**Unimportant**                                                                                  
While petrified, mobs will quickly lose interest in you.                                          
Furthermore, other players cannot properly identify you in your petrified state.                   
[_Your nametag will not be visible while petrified_]

🟢**Swift**                                                                                        
You move significantly faster than others while not exposed to the sun.

🟢**Lonely Assassin**                                                                            
You deal increased damage while not exposed to the sun.                                                    
Additionally, you deal more damage if your target is blinded.                                              

🔵**Space Distortion [Load Hotbar Activator]**                                                     
Anything that you attack has a chance to be randomly teleported.                                            
This can be toggled, but it only works while you are close to the target.                   

🔵**Blink [Primary Ability]**                                                                     
You can instantly teleport to the location you are looking at.                                                     
Doing so while petrified will damage you.                                                      
_Teleporting directly to an entity will either blind it or teleport it if Space Distortion is enabled_   

🔴**Unwieldy**                                                                                    
Thanks to your supernatural defense mechanisms, you never had to learn how to use a shield or wear armor.                                                                                           
While you can still wear armor, it will grant you significantly less protection.

🔴**Sun Aversion**                                                                               
Being exposed to the sun will weaken you and make you slower.

🔵**Watcher's Mark**                                                                                
Entities that directly look at a Lapidion will glow for you even up to five seconds after looking away from one.
